movies.question: Which movie won the Oscar for Best Picture in 2024?
movies.explanation: Oppenheimer won 7 Oscars including Best Picture at the 96th Academy Awards.

movies.question: Who directed the movie 'Avatar' (2009)?
movies.explanation: James Cameron directed Avatar, which became the highest-grossing film of all time.

movies.question: Which is the highest-grossing Bollywood movie of all time?
movies.explanation: Dangal grossed over ₹2000 crore worldwide, making it the highest-grossing Indian film.

movies.question: Which movie features the iconic line 'May the Force be with you'?
movies.explanation: This is the most famous quote from the Star Wars franchise.

movies.question: Which Netflix series is set in Madrid and involves a heist?
movies.explanation: Money Heist is a Spanish crime thriller about heists at the Royal Mint of Spain.

movies.question: Which Disney movie features the song 'Let It Go'?
movies.explanation: 'Let It Go' is the iconic song from Disney's Frozen, sung by Elsa.

movies.question: Who played Iron Man in the Marvel Cinematic Universe?
movies.explanation: Robert Downey Jr. portrayed Tony Stark/Iron Man in 10 MCU films.

movies.question: Which Shah Rukh Khan movie completed 30 years in theaters in 2023?
movies.explanation: DDLJ (1995) holds the record for longest-running film in Indian cinema history.

movies.question: Which movie won the first Academy Award for Best Picture?
movies.explanation: Wings (1927) won the first Oscar for Best Picture at the 1929 ceremony.

movies.question: In 'Toy Story', what is the name of the cowboy doll?
movies.explanation: Woody is the main character and Andy's favorite toy in Toy Story.

gaming.question: Which game is known as the 'Building game'?
gaming.explanation: Minecraft is famous for its building and creativity mechanics.

gaming.question: What does 'NPC' stand for in gaming?
gaming.explanation: NPCs are characters controlled by the game AI, not players.

gaming.question: Which company makes PlayStation?
gaming.explanation: Sony Interactive Entertainment develops and publishes PlayStation consoles.

gaming.question: In PUBG, what does 'Battlegrounds' stand for?
gaming.explanation: PUBG stands for PlayerUnknown's Battlegrounds, named after Brendan Greene.

gaming.question: Which character is the mascot of Nintendo?
gaming.explanation: Mario is Nintendo's flagship character since 1981.

gaming.question: Which game has the largest esports prize pool?
gaming.explanation: Dota 2's The International tournament has the highest esports prize pools.

gaming.question: Which mobile game introduced the 'Battle Pass' system?
gaming.explanation: Fortnite popularized the Battle Pass monetization system in 2018.

gaming.question: Which game won Game of the Year at The Game Awards 2022?
gaming.explanation: Elden Ring won 6 awards including Game of the Year at The Game Awards 2022.

gaming.question: What is the best-selling video game of all time?
gaming.explanation: Minecraft has sold over 300 million copies, making it the best-selling game.

gaming.question: Which Call of Duty game was the first in the series?
gaming.explanation: The original Call of Duty was released in 2003 for PC.

ai-ml.question: What does AI stand for?
ai-ml.explanation: AI stands for Artificial Intelligence - simulation of human intelligence by machines.

ai-ml.question: Which algorithm is primarily used for classification problems?
ai-ml.explanation: Decision Trees are commonly used for classification tasks in ML.

ai-ml.question: What does CNN stand for in deep learning?
ai-ml.explanation: CNNs are neural networks designed for processing grid-like data (images).

ai-ml.question: What is 'overfitting' in machine learning?

options.text: Model performs well on training data but poorly on test data
Model performs poorly on both training and test data
Model performs well on both training and test data
Model is too simple to capture patterns

ai-ml.explanation: Overfitting occurs when a model memorizes training data but fails to generalize.

ai-ml.question: Which Python library is most popular for machine learning?
ai-ml.explanation: scikit-learn is the most popular ML library in Python.

ai-ml.question: What does NLP stand for in AI?
ai-ml.explanation: NLP is the field of AI focused on interaction between computers and human language.

ai-ml.question: Which company developed TensorFlow?
ai-ml.explanation: TensorFlow is an open-source ML framework developed by Google.

ai-ml.question: What is the 'Curse of Dimensionality'?

options.text: Problems arising when analyzing data in high-dimensional spaces
When a model has too few features
When data is too small to train a model
When neural networks are too deep

ai-ml.explanation: The Curse of Dimensionality refers to various phenomena that arise when analyzing data in high-dimensional spaces.

ai-ml.question: Which AI model type is used for generating text like ChatGPT?
ai-ml.explanation: Transformers are the architecture behind modern LLMs like ChatGPT.

ai-ml.question: What is 'AI bias'?

options.text: When AI models make unfair decisions due to biased training data
When AI is slower than humans

ai-ml.explanation: AI bias occurs when training data contains prejudices, leading to unfair AI decisions.

science.question: Which planet has the most moons?
science.explanation: Saturn has 146 confirmed moons, the most in our solar system.

science.question: What is the hardest natural substance on Earth?
science.explanation: Diamond is the hardest known natural material on the Mohs scale.

science.question: What is the speed of light in vacuum?
science.explanation: The speed of light is approximately 299,792 km/s.

science.question: What is the largest organ in the human body?
science.explanation: Skin is the largest organ, covering about 2 square meters in adults.

science.question: What is H2O commonly known as?
science.explanation: H2O is the chemical formula for water.

science.question: Who developed the theory of relativity?
science.explanation: Albert Einstein developed the theory of relativity.

science.question: Which organ pumps blood in the human body?
science.explanation: The heart pumps blood throughout the body.

science.question: Which planet is closest to the Sun?
science.explanation: Mercury is the closest planet to the Sun.

science.question: What gas do plants absorb from the atmosphere?
science.explanation: Plants absorb carbon dioxide for photosynthesis.

science.question: What is the SI unit of force?
science.explanation: The SI unit of force is Newton (N).

gk.question: What is the capital of India?
gk.explanation: New Delhi is the capital of India.

gk.question: Which is the largest ocean on Earth?
gk.explanation: The Pacific Ocean is the largest, covering about 63 million square miles.

gk.question: Who invented the telephone?
gk.explanation: Alexander Graham Bell was awarded the first US patent for the telephone in 1876.

gk.question: Which planet is known as the Red Planet?
gk.explanation: Mars is called the Red Planet due to iron oxide on its surface.

gk.question: How many colors are in a rainbow?
gk.explanation: A rainbow has 7 colors: Red, Orange, Yellow, Green, Blue, Indigo, Violet.

gk.question: Which country won the ICC Cricket World Cup 2023?
gk.explanation: Australia won the ICC Cricket World Cup 2023.

gk.question: Who was the first President of India?
gk.explanation: Dr. Rajendra Prasad was the first President of India.

gk.question: Which gas do humans need to breathe?
Who founded Microsoft?
gk.explanation: Microsoft was founded by Bill Gates and Paul Allen.

gk.question: Which is the largest continent on Earth?
gk.explanation: Asia is the largest continent by area and population.

anime.question: Who is Naruto Uzumaki's father?
anime.explanation: Minato Namikaze, the Fourth Hokage, is Naruto's father.

anime.explanation: Luffy leads the Straw Hat Pirates in One Piece.

anime.question: What is Goku's Saiyan name?
anime.explanation: Goku's original Saiyan name is Kakarot.

anime.explanation: Ryuk intentionally drops the Death Note into the human world.

anime.question: What is Tanjiro's sister's name?
anime.explanation: Nezuko Kamado is Tanjiro's demon sister.

anime.question: Who is known as the strongest sorcerer?
anime.explanation: Satoru Gojo is considered the strongest jujutsu sorcerer.

anime.question: What transformation does Kaneki undergo?
anime.explanation: Kaneki becomes a half-ghoul after surgery.

anime.question: What is Ichigo Kurosaki's primary power?
anime.explanation: Ichigo becomes a Substitute Soul Reaper.

anime.question: Who is Pikachu's trainer?
anime.explanation: Ash Ketchum is Pikachu's long-time trainer.

music.explanation: Michael Jackson is globally known as the King of Pop.

music.question: Which Indian singer is known as the 'Nightingale of India'?

memes.question: Which meme features a dog saying 'Such Wow'?
memes.explanation: Doge meme became famous with 'Such Wow' captions.

memes.explanation: Pepe the Frog became one of the most used internet memes.

memes.explanation: Ratio is used when replies outperform likes, often negatively.
